title: POST /books endpoint with required fields
evidence: src/lib.rs:146-167 create_book handler accepts title, author, year, isbn

title: GET /books with ?author= filter support
evidence: src/lib.rs:170-192 list_books handler supports optional author filter parameter
suggestion: Complete — filter works correctly as verified by test list_with_author_filter

title: GET /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: src/lib.rs:195-213 get_book handler with path parameter and 404 on missing

title: PUT /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: src/lib.rs:216-241 update_book handler with validation and 404 on missing
suggestion: Complete — validates required fields and handles missing books

title: DELETE /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: src/lib.rs:244-254 delete_book handler with 204 and 404 responses
suggestion: Complete — returns NO_CONTENT on success, NOT_FOUND on missing

title: SQLite data storage
evidence: src/lib.rs:77-96 open_db and init_schema functions use rusqlite with bundled SQLite
suggestion: Complete — uses rusqlite with bundled SQLite, no external dependency required

title: JSON responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
evidence: src/lib.rs:99-107 router setup with handlers returning statusCode+Json; ApiError impl for JSON error responses
suggestion: Complete — all handlers return proper status codes (201 CREATED, 200 OK, 204 NO_CONTENT, 400 BAD_REQUEST, 404 NOT_FOUND, 500 INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)

title: Input validation for title and author
evidence: src/lib.rs:111-128 require_fields function validates both title and author are non-empty after trimming
suggestion: Complete — enforced in POST and PUT endpoints

title: Health check endpoint GET /health
evidence: src/lib.rs:141-143 health handler; src/lib.rs:101 route defined; tests/api.rs:43-49 test_health_check

title: Working source code in workspace directory
evidence: Complete Rust project structure with Cargo.toml, src/lib.rs, src/main.rs, tests/api.rs; builds and tests pass
suggestion: Complete — project builds cleanly and all 7 tests pass

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md contains requirements, run instructions, environment variables, test commands, API documentation, and examples
suggestion: Complete — comprehensive documentation with clear examples

title: At least 3 unit/integration tests
evidence: tests/api.rs contains 7 tests: health_check_returns_ok, create_then_get_book, create_requires_title_and_author, list_with_author_filter, update_book_replaces_fields, delete_book_then_404, get_missing_book_returns_404
suggestion: Complete — 7 tests well exceed the 3-test requirement; tests cover all endpoints and edge cases

title: Build succeeded
evidence: cargo build --quiet completed without errors; cargo clippy -- -D warnings passed with no warnings
